case_title: MICHELLE DAY VS. ALVIN BEGAY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT BEGAY, ALVIN REYES, BEATRICE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-14-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-13-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-30-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, MICHELLE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-18-2013. FEB-20-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-20-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE JAN-15-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR ROGER WILLIAM SLEIGHT APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-29-2013 THROUGH JUN-27-2013.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 7/8/12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, MICHELLE SERVED JUL-08-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BEGAY, ALVIN
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT REYES, BEATRICE
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-28-2013.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT ANDREW BRAGG.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 6/4/12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, MICHELLE SERVED JUN-24-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, BEATRICE

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BEGAY, ALVIN REYES, BEATRICE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF MAR-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
